prompt: Give me a short pep talk before I start a hard task I have been putting off all morning.
response: You've got this! The hardest part is always getting started. It'll get easier from here. You've done hard things before and come out stronger on the other side. This is no different. Deep breath in... and exhale. Now go show that task who's boss! I'm right here cheering you on. You've got this!|+
